Financial

Terms{{ dict(payment_terms_map).get(vendor.payment_terms, vendor.payment_terms) }}
Currency{{ vendor.currency }}
Total Spent${{ "{:,.2f}".format(total_spent) }}
Balance${{ "{:,.2f}".format(vendor.current_balance or 0) }}

Rating

{% if vendor.overall_rating %}
{{ vendor.overall_rating }}/5 overall
Quality: {{ vendor.quality_rating or '--' }} | Delivery: {{ vendor.delivery_rating or '--' }} | Price: {{ vendor.price_rating or '--' }}

Trades

{% elif tab == 'pos' %}
Purchase Orders
{% if pos %}
{% for po in pos %}{% endfor %}
PO #DateStatusTotalBalanceReceipt %
{{ po.po_number }}{{ po.order_date.strftime('%m/%d/%y') if po.order_date else '' }}{{ po.status.replace('_',' ')|title }}${{ "{:,.2f}".format(po.total or 0) }}${{ "{:,.2f}".format(po.balance_due) }}{{ po.receipt_progress }}%
{% else %}
No purchase orders yet.
{% endif %}
{% elif tab == 'payments' %}

Payment History

{% if user.role in ('admin','owner') %}{% endif %}
Payments
{% if payments %}
{% for p in payments %}{% endfor %}
Payment #DateMethodAmountReference
{{ p.payment_number }}{{ p.payment_date.strftime('%m/%d/%y') if p.payment_date else '' }}{{ p.payment_method.replace('_',' ')|title }}${{ "{:,.2f}".format(p.amount) }}{{ p.reference_number or '--' }}
{% else %}
No payments recorded.
{% endif %}
{% elif tab == 'pricing' %}

Products & Pricing

{% if user.role in ('admin','owner','dispatcher') %}{% endif %}
Vendor Pricing
{% if prices %}
{% for vp in prices %}{% endfor %}
PartVendor Part #Unit PriceBulk PriceLead TimePreferred
{{ vp.part.name if vp.part else '--' }}{{ vp.vendor_part_number or '--' }}${{ "%.2f"|format(vp.unit_price) }}{% if vp.bulk_price %}<${{"%.2f"|format(vp.bulk_price)}} ({{ vp.bulk_threshold }}+){% else %}--{% endif %}{% if vp.lead_time_days %}{{ vp.lead_time_days }}d{% else %}--{% endif %}{% if vp.is_preferred %}{% endif %}
{% else %}
No pricing records.
{% endif %}
{% endif %} {% if tab == 'pricing' %}
